programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: As America's stock of athletic young men is depleted during World War II, a professional all-female baseball league springs up in the Midwest, funded by publicity-hungry candy maker Walter Harvey (Garry Marshall). Competitive sisters Dottie Hinson (Geena Davis) and Kit Keller (Lori Petty) spar with each other, scout Ernie Capadino (Jon Lovitz) and grumpy has-been coach Jimmy Dugan (Tom Hanks) on their way to fame. Madonna and Rosie O'Donnell co-star as two of the sisters' teammates.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mrs. Doubtfire
programme.desc: An unemployed actor disguises himself as an elderly nanny in order to spend more time with his estranged family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: As America's stock of athletic young men is depleted during World War II, a professional all-female baseball league springs up in the Midwest, funded by publicity-hungry candy maker Walter Harvey (Garry Marshall). Competitive sisters Dottie Hinson (Geena Davis) and Kit Keller (Lori Petty) spar with each other, scout Ernie Capadino (Jon Lovitz) and grumpy has-been coach Jimmy Dugan (Tom Hanks) on their way to fame. Madonna and Rosie O'Donnell co-star as two of the sisters' teammates.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: He's the wrong person, at the wrong place, at the wrong time. Joe Dirt (David Spade) is a janitor with a mullet hairdo, acid-washed jeans and a dream -- to find the parents that he lost at the Grand Canyon when he was eight. As his wandering, misguided search takes him from one misadventure to another, he finds his way to Los Angeles, where a shock-jock (Dennis Miller) brings Joe on the radio to insult him. But as Joe's story unfolds, jeers turn to cheers, and an entire city is captivated.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: Todd and Julie look for new ways to connect and put a spark back in their relationship; Savannah and Chase go on adventures.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: When Julie's demanding pregnant friend visits, Todd's home life is disrupted; Todd reaches out to Lindsie.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.sub-title: Still Chrisley After All These Years
programme.desc: Julie and Todd throw a charity event for breast cancer to celebrate their wedding anniversary; after a mix-up everyone must scramble.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best
programme.desc: The Chrisleys are interviewed for a magazine and Todd writes a script for his family to memorize; when things go off script, Todd retaliates with some honesty.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scandals
programme.desc: In 2003, supermodel Tyra Banks broke into the world of reality TV; ANTM offered women from all over the country the promise of fame and fortune, but the aspiring models soon realize they may be collateral damage on the show's path to popularity.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scandals
programme.desc: As ANTM becomes more popular, it pulls in more seemingly vulnerable girls; some hopeful contestants claim they were treated increasingly poorly, leading to allegations of lasting trauma from what they endured on the show.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scandals
programme.desc: America loved Bob Barker, but few knew about the scandal behind the scenes at The Price is Right; former employees break decades of silence, exposing a hidden affair and secrets that reveal a darker side of television's most beloved game show icon.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scandals
programme.desc: Bob Barker retaliates against model Holly Hallstrom after she refuses to testify on his behalf, triggering a decade-long legal war; as mass firings and new allegations surface, Barker's power is exposed and the women who stood up are finally heard.

programme.title: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: He's the wrong person, at the wrong place, at the wrong time. Joe Dirt (David Spade) is a janitor with a mullet hairdo, acid-washed jeans and a dream -- to find the parents that he lost at the Grand Canyon when he was eight. As his wandering, misguided search takes him from one misadventure to another, he finds his way to Los Angeles, where a shock-jock (Dennis Miller) brings Joe on the radio to insult him. But as Joe's story unfolds, jeers turn to cheers, and an entire city is captivated.

programme.desc: As America's stock of athletic young men is depleted during World War II, a professional all-female baseball league springs up in the Midwest, funded by publicity-hungry candy maker Walter Harvey (Garry Marshall). programme.title: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: He's the wrong person, at the wrong place, at the wrong time. Joe Dirt (David Spade) is a janitor with a mullet hairdo, acid-washed jeans and a dream -- to find the parents that he lost at the Grand Canyon when he was eight. As his wandering, misguided search takes him from one misadventure to another, he finds his way to Los Angeles, where a shock-jock (Dennis Miller) brings Joe on the radio to insult him. But as Joe's story unfolds, jeers turn to cheers, and an entire city is captivated.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Waterboy
programme.desc: Raised by his overprotective mother, Helen, Bobby Boucher Jr. is the water boy for a successful college football team coached by Red Beaulieu. When Beaulieu fires Bobby, he takes up the same position for a losing rival team, led by despairing Coach Klein. After witnessing Bobby beat up a player who teased him too much, Klein adds him to the roster as a linebacker. Soon, Klein's players are championship contenders.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Playboy vet Henry sets his heart on romancing Lucy, but she has short-term memory loss. She can't remember anything that happened the day before. So every morning, Henry has to woo her again. Her friends and family are very protective and Henry must convince them that he's in it for love.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: His heart recently broken, plastic surgeon Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) pretends to be married so he can enjoy future dates with no strings attached. His web of lies works, but when he meets Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) -- the gal of his dreams -- she resists involvement. Instead of coming clean, Danny enlists Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his assistant, to pose as his soon-to-be-ex-wife. Instead of solving Danny's problems, the lies create more trouble.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: Thirty-two-year-old Sonny Koufax (Adam Sandler) has spent his whole life avoiding responsibility. But when his girlfriend dumps him for an older man, he's got to find a way to prove he's ready to grow up. In a desperate last-ditch effort, Sonny adopts 5-year-old Julian (Dylan Sprouse), (Cole Sprouse) to impress her. She's not impressed ... and he can't return the kid. Uh-oh for Sonny!

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The King of Staten Island
programme.desc: An aimless slacker dreams of becoming a tattoo artist while living with his mother and hanging out with his friends in Staten Island, N.Y.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.desc: Brody Jenner baby-sits while the women head to Mexico for a photo shoot.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.desc: Kim poses for a Playboy photo shoot.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.desc: Kourtney gives Kris the cold shoulder after she screws up and is a no show for her first cover shoot; Rob has problems adjusting to living with a girlfriend.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.sub-title: I'd Rather Go Naked ... Or Shopping
programme.desc: Khloé faces body image issues when she agrees to do a nude campaign for PETA; the family worries about Kim's massive shopping habit.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.desc: Kim has the busiest week of her life as she prepares for the birth of her fourth baby, stars in a music video with Paris Hilton, and heads to the Met Gala; Kourtney realizes someone close to her family has been stealing from her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Thirty-two-year-old Sonny Koufax (Adam Sandler) has spent his whole life avoiding responsibility. programme.title: E! Live From the Red Carpet
programme.desc: Zuri Hall is on the steps of the Met Gala while Justin Sylvester, Keltie Knight, Zanna Roberts Rassi, Ciara Miller, Bronwyn Newport and Renee Montgomery cover fashion; Erin Lim Rhodes meets celebs at The Pierre Hotel and the Glambot makes its debut.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Taylor
programme.desc: Tracing Taylor Swift's path from childhood recordings to global stadium tours, featuring rare early footage and thoughtful commentary from cultural voices, industry figures and longtime fans.

programme.title: E! Live From the Red Carpet
programme.desc: Zuri Hall is on the steps of the Met Gala while Justin Sylvester, Keltie Knight, Zanna Roberts Rassi, Ciara Miller, Bronwyn Newport and Renee Montgomery cover fashion; Erin Lim Rhodes meets celebs at The Pierre Hotel and the Glambot makes its debut.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
